title: サマースプリントシリーズ制覇！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Curren Chan conquers the Summer Sprint Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She receives an award from Director Akikawa, as
well as the opportunity to get a picture with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While sharing her knowledge about taking cute
pictures, the two discuss a promotion campaign
for the school...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which is how Curren Chan cleverly lands herself a
job as the campaign's face.
